autoAddPost._comment: (0/1) Automatically publish the generated post without requiring manual approval.

autoGenerate._comment: (0/1-x) Automatically search for and generate posts. 0 disables the feature, while x defines the interval in minutes. When enabled, autoAddPost is ignored.

autoGenerateOption._comment: (0/1/...) Select the post generation method: 0 = latest post, 1 = highest-rated post. More options may be added later.

minRating._comment: (0-x) Minimum required post rating. Posts with a lower rating will be skipped.

maxTime._comment: (0-x) Maximum post age in hours. Older posts will be skipped. 0 disables the age limit.

generateImage._comment: (0/1/2) Image generation mode: 0 = disabled, 1 = generate from the original post image, 2 = generate from the AI-generated post content.

copyImage._comment: (0/1) Copy the image from the original scraped post.
